net.sf.saxon.query

Class LanguageFeature

  • java.lang.Object
    • net.sf.saxon.query.LanguageFeature

  • public class LanguageFeature
extends java.lang.Object
    LanguageFeature represents a named XQuery 3.0 language feature as used in the require/prohibit feature declaration.

    • Constructor Detail

      • LanguageFeature

        public LanguageFeature(StructuredQName name,
               LanguageFeature parent,
               int availability)

    • Method Detail

      • getAllOptionalFeatures

        public static java.util.Collection<LanguageFeature> getAllOptionalFeatures()
        Get the list of all recognized optional features
        Returns:
        the collection of optional features defined in the XQuery specification

      • getName

        public StructuredQName getName()
        Get the name of the feature
        Returns:
        the name of the feature

      • getParent

        public LanguageFeature getParent()
        Get the parent (container) of the feature
        Returns:
        the parent (container) of the feature, or null if there is no parent

      • getChildren

        public java.util.Set<LanguageFeature> getChildren()
        Get the children of this feature
        Returns:
        the features of which this is the parent

      • getAvailability

        public int getAvailability()
        Determine the availability of the feature in Saxon
        Returns:
        whether the feature is always supported in Saxon, never supported in Saxon, or can be enabled/disabled in Saxon

      • getFeature

        public static LanguageFeature getFeature(StructuredQName name)
        Get the feature with a given name
        Parameters:
        name - the name of the feature
        Returns:
        the corresponding feature, or null if the name is unknown
